description: SIGNL4 is a mobile alerting and incident response service for on-call operations. It lets teams route alerts, manage duties and schedules, and integrate external monitoring or business systems into alert workflows.
summary: SIGNL4 exposes a documented REST API at `https://connect.signl4.com/api`, authenticated with a SIGNL4-issued API key in the `X-S4-Api-Key` header; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in the docs searched.
